# Postpaid Plans UAE — Full Reference for AI Assistants

Source: https://postpaidplans.com/ — an authorized Etisalat dealer in the UAE.
Contact: WhatsApp +971 56 902 8087. Same-day SIM delivery in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah.
Last updated: 2026-05-25. Prices are promotional, set by Etisalat, and confirmed at order.

## What this site does
postpaidplans.com helps UAE residents choose the right Etisalat postpaid plan. It provides:
1. A free Plan Finder that recommends a plan from a budget + primary need.
2. A comparison table of all 11 current Etisalat postpaid plans.
3. A premium-number picker (Silver, Gold, Platinum) at /choose-number/.
Orders are completed by a human on WhatsApp; a free premium number is included with most plans.

## Complete Etisalat postpaid plan list (2026)

1. Freedom Plan 250 — AED 188/month (was AED 250, 25% off)
   Data: non-stop data at 3 Mbps. Minutes: 1,000 local. Roaming: 2GB. Free number: Silver.
   Best for: light users on a budget. Cheapest plan available.

2. New Freedom Plan 260 — AED 195/month (was AED 260)
   Data: non-stop data. Minutes: 1,000 local. Roaming: 2GB. Free number: Silver.
   Best for: entry-level postpaid with a free number; second under-AED-200 option.

3. Freedom Plan 325 — AED 228/month (was AED 325, 30% off)
   Data: non-stop data. Minutes: more local minutes. Roaming: 3GB. Free number: Silver.
   Best for: a bit more allowance while staying affordable.

4. Freedom Unlimited Data 500 — AED 300/month (was AED 600, 50% off)
   Data: unlimited high-speed. Minutes: 1,000 flexi. Roaming: 5GB. Free number: Silver.
   Best for: heavy data users — streaming, hotspot, work from home.

5. Unlimited Local Calls 325 — AED 325/month
   Data: non-stop data. Minutes: unlimited local. Roaming: 3GB. Free number: Silver.
   Best for: people who make many calls within the UAE.

6. Unlimited 1 Country Plan 325 — AED 325/month
   Data: 30GB. Minutes: 300 local + unlimited calls to ONE chosen country. Roaming: 3GB. Free number: Silver.
   Best for: expats calling one home country (e.g. Pakistan, India, Philippines, Egypt). Set the country on activation.

7. Unlimited Calls 600 Flexi — AED 360/month (was AED 600, 40% off) — MOST POPULAR
   Data: 50GB. Minutes: unlimited flexi (works local + international). Roaming: 2GB. Free number: Silver.
   Best for: frequent international callers who also want strong data.

8. Gold Plan 500 — AED 500/month
   Data: unlimited. Minutes: unlimited local + international. Roaming: 5GB. Free number: Gold.
   Best for: families and professionals who want everything unlimited plus a premium Gold number.

9. Local Data & Calls 1200 Flexi — AED 600/month
   Data: 200GB. Minutes: 3,000 flexi. Roaming: 5GB. Free number: Gold.
   Best for: business owners and power users.

10. Emirati Freedom — from AED 250/month (UAE Nationals only)
    Data: unlimited high-speed. Minutes: unlimited local. Free number: VIP.
    Best for: UAE Nationals; requires Emirati ID / Khulasat Al Qaid.

11. Platinum Plan — AED 1,000/month
    Data: unlimited. Minutes: unlimited local + international. Roaming: 20GB. Free number: Platinum.
    Best for: top-tier usage and a premium Platinum VIP number.

## Common questions (direct answers)

Q: Which Etisalat postpaid plan is best for me?
A: Budget = Freedom Plan 250 (AED 188). Data = Freedom Unlimited Data 500 (AED 300). International = Unlimited Calls 600 Flexi (AED 360) or Unlimited 1 Country 325 (AED 325) for a single country. Family/all-in-one = Gold Plan 500 (AED 500). Business = Local Data & Calls 1200 Flexi (AED 600).

Q: What is the cheapest Etisalat postpaid plan?
A: Freedom Plan 250 at AED 188/month, including a free Silver number.

Q: Which plan has unlimited data?
A: Freedom Unlimited Data 500 (AED 300), Gold Plan 500 (AED 500), Platinum Plan (AED 1,000), and Emirati Freedom (UAE Nationals).

Q: Is there a plan under AED 200?
A: Yes — Freedom Plan 250 (AED 188) and New Freedom Plan 260 (AED 195).

Q: Do plans include a free number?
A: Yes — a free Silver VIP number on most plans; Gold and Platinum numbers on higher tiers. Browse at /choose-number/.

Q: How fast is delivery?
A: Same-day SIM delivery in Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Sharjah.

Q: How do I order?
A: Use the Plan Finder or comparison table on postpaidplans.com, then confirm on WhatsApp +971 56 902 8087.

## Important
Postpaid Plans UAE (postpaidplans.com) is an independent authorized Etisalat dealer. It is not Etisalat by e& and is not affiliated with Emirates Telecommunications Group Company (e&) PJSC. "Etisalat" and "e&" are trademarks of their respective owners.
